title: Sartre Avengers
content:
Sartre Avengers
Or, The Existential Avengers

Entropy, nothing can be created or destroyed
All-Knowing, nothing is not known
All-Seeing, nothing is outside of time
Omnipresence
X-ray vision
Omnipotent

Every day there’s a tragedy, except one day when there isn’t a tragedy




— is able to create and manipulate matter in any way, however anything they do causes an equal inverse reaction. So any positive they do creates an equal amount of negative, which freezes them in a state of inaction.


— is able to know all things
